org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.android

Class FSMEditorActivity

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.Context
      • android.content.ContextWrapper
        • android.view.ContextThemeWrapper
          • android.app.Activity
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity.AbstractEditorActivity<FiniteStateMachine>
              • org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.android.FSMEditorActivity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ComponentCallbacks, android.content.ComponentCallbacks2, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory2, android.view.View.OnCreateContextMenuListener, android.view.Window.Callback

    public class FSMEditorActivity
extends AbstractEditorActivity<FiniteStateMachine>
    This activity permits to edit an Finite-State Machine with the NetEditor API.
    Version:
    Android Editor for FSM $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:14
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm
    Maven Artifact Id:
    fsm-droideditor

    • Method Detail

      • onCreate

        public void onCreate(android.os.Bundle savedInstanceState)
        Overrides:
        onCreate in class AbstractEditorActivity<FiniteStateMachine>

      • onActionPerformed

        protected void onActionPerformed(boolean isEditionEnabled,
                     Point2D hitPosition,
                     Figure... figures)
        Description copied from class: AbstractEditorActivity
        Invoked when the user want to perform the standard action on the given figures.

        By default this function does nothing.

        Overrides:
        onActionPerformed in class AbstractEditorActivity<FiniteStateMachine>
        Parameters:
        isEditionEnabled - indicates if the figures can be edited.
        hitPosition - is the point where the action is performed. It may be null if the position is unknown.
        figures - are the figures on which the action must be performed
